summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sistema Gestao TJ with all required corrections. Frontend perfectly implements all requirements - Vendas/Pedidos removed from navigation, Reports has 3 tabs (DRE, ABC, Inventory Turnover) with cash flow removed, Alerts page removes forbidden buttons. Backend APIs mostly working but has legacy endpoints that should be cleaned up.

legacy_endpoints.issue: Sales/Vendas endpoints still active in backend
legacy_endpoints.impact: Should be removed per requirements but frontend correctly doesn't expose them

legacy_endpoints.issue: Orders/Pedidos endpoints still active in backend
legacy_endpoints.impact: Should be removed per requirements but frontend correctly doesn't expose them

legacy_endpoints.issue: Cash flow report endpoint still active
legacy_endpoints.impact: Should be removed per requirements but frontend correctly doesn't expose it

mocked_integrations.impact: Expected behavior - LLM integration is MOCKED

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with responsive cards on desktop
Navigation menu correctly removes Vendas and Pedidos
Warehouses page with sectors and active/inactive status editing
Invoices page accessible with proper structure
Reports page has exactly 3 tabs: DRE, Curva ABC, Giro de Estoque (NO cash flow)
Audit page with filters and export functionality
Alerts page correctly removes 'Verificar estoque' and 'Enviar notificação' buttons
Guide page loads with step-by-step content
Mobile responsive design with hamburger menu
All CRUD operations working in backend
action_item_for_main_agent: Clean up legacy backend endpoints: Remove Sales/Vendas APIs (/api/sales/*), Orders/Pedidos APIs (/api/orders/*), and Cash Flow report API (/api/reports/cash-flow) to fully comply with requirements. Frontend implementation is perfect and meets all requirements.
